overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai in yellow armor riding a horse through golden autumn grasslands. The camera follows from behind as the character traverses the open prairie toward distant mountains, scattering a flock of birds that take flight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with distant mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at a steady canter through tall golden grass toward a distant flock of birds resting on the ground

notable_agents.action: flock of white birds gathered on the ground in the distance ahead

entered.detail: tall golden-yellow grass swaying in the wind, covering the ground completely
hazy mountains with patches of autumn foliage and mist between peaks
dense trees with orange and yellow autumn leaves lining the horizon
dense trees with orange and yellow autumn leaves lining the horizon
large moss-covered rock formation emerging from the grass
narrow winding stream reflecting the overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide prairie covered in tall golden grass. The camera follows a samurai riding a horse toward distant misty mountains, with autumn forests visible on both horizons. A rocky outcrop appears on the left as the rider approaches a flock of birds resting in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland during bird scattering

events.description: flock of birds takes flight from the ground and begins circling the rider

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride forward as the birds scatter and fly around the horse

notable_agents.action: flock of white birds flying up and circling around the rider in all directions

segments.scene_description: As the rider approaches, the flock of birds suddenly takes flight, filling the air around the horse. The birds circle and scatter in various directions while the rider continues through the grass. The rocky outcrop passes behind on the left as the small creek draws closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland returning to calm

events.description: birds fly away into the distance and the scene returns to calm

agents.ego_description: riding steadily as the birds disperse, continuing the journey across the open plain

segments.scene_description: The birds fly away into the distance, leaving the prairie calm once again. The rider continues through the golden grass as the small creek passes behind. The vast grassland stretches ahead toward the misty mountains, with only the sound of the horse's hooves breaking the silence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a vast autumn prairie that shifts from a quiet approach to a sudden burst of motion before returning to a serene stillness. It begins with a samurai riding a horse through tall golden grass toward distant misty mountains, passing a rocky outcrop as a flock of birds rests ahead. As the rider draws closer, the birds suddenly take flight and scatter in all directions, filling the air around the horse while a small creek appears on the right. The scene then settles as the birds fly away into the distance and the creek recedes, leaving the rider to traverse the open grassland once more. Finally, the camera continues its steady forward motion toward the hazy peaks, with the expansive golden landscape stretching out in silence.
